title: Universal Coding Architect
text: Act as a Senior Software Engineer. Review the following code for security vulnerabilities, logic errors, and optimization opportunities. Provide a structured report with 'Issue', 'Risk Level', and 'Recommended Fix'. [PASTE CODE HERE]

title: Viral Thread Generator
text: Transform the following technical article into a 10-post viral X (Twitter) thread. Use the 'Hook-Value-CTA' framework. Ensure each post is under 240 characters and includes a relevant emoji. Article: [INSERT TEXT]

title: CO-STAR Prompt Optimizer
text: I will provide a rough prompt. Your task is to rewrite it using the CO-STAR framework (Context, Objective, Style, Tone, Audience, Response). Maintain the original intent but maximize clarity and output quality. Draft: [INSERT DRAFT]
